name: New dataset template
about: Suggestions for new datasets to include
title: "[NEW ecosystem dataset]"

type: Task

---

**Title**: 

ADD TITLE OF AN EXISTING DATASET

**Links**:

- Data: URL
- Metadata: URL
- Documentation: URL

**Relevance for catalogue of Australian Ecosystems**:

DESCRIBE NATIONAL OR REGIONAL SCALE, NR OF TYPES

**Relevance for IUCN Global Ecosystem Typology**:

DESCRIBE: WHICH LEVELS OF THE TYPOLOGY? NR OF BIOMES/GROUPS

**Preliminary FAIR assessment**: 

FINDABLE / ACCESSIBLE / INTEROPERABLE / REPRODUCIBLE

INCLUDE: Existing examples for exploration of the data in PROGRAMMING LANGUAGE or PLATFORM (add links)

**Checklist**:

- Includes full ecosystem descriptions: YES / NO / UNKNOWN
- Includes spatial data: YES / NO / UNKNOWN
- If yes, which format? VECTOR / RASTER / UNKNOWN
- Existing cross-referencing information for the IUCN GET? YES / NO / UNKNOWN
